title: About
text:
I am an AI enthusiast, developer, and student. When I’m not writing code or reading up on linear algebra, you can usually find me playing badminton or a game of chess.
Interests: * Astrodynamics * Deep Learning & Swarms * Low-level programming & OS development * Competitive AI

title: Welcome to My Technical Blog
text:
Hey, I am Vedant.
This is my space for sharing my research, blogs and technical write ups. I’m currently diving deep into Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Swarms, with Astrodynamics and Edge AI.
Expect future posts on everything from exploring NLP and Computer Vision to posting about math and assignments. Stay tuned!
